rulings.Case Title: THOMAS RUBINO et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel R. T. Vanderbilt Company To Produce Outstanding Documents In Connection With The Deposition Of R.T. Vanderbilt Companys Person Most Knowledgeable-Custodian Of Records
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, MARCH 2, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel RT Vanderbilt to produce outstanding documents in connection with the deposition of its person most knowledgeable was heard and granted on February 9 and continued to March 2 for a compliance hearing. Based on Ms. Mattis¿ letter of march 1, the parties are required to attend the hearing. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RUFUS ALEXANDER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Having Subject Matter Of Request For Admissions Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, MARCH 2, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 2. Defendant Cummins Engine Co.¿s motion to compel responses to form interrogatories, special interrogatories and request for production and having subject matter of request for admissions deemed admitted and for sanctions is continued on the court¿s own motion to March 9 at 1:30pm. = (220/HEK)
